error: AscendC compilation/runtime was blocked by toolkit-owned opp/vendors/config.ini permissions and missing custom-op OPP lookup during execution.
code_diff: Compile under a user-owned ASCEND_OPP_PATH overlay, then update ModelNew._touch_custom_op() to temporarily switch ASCEND_OPP_PATH to that overlay only while invoking custom_ops_lib.windowed_causal_attention_custom and restore the original path afterwards.
summary: When shared Ascend toolkit permissions or runtime OPP lookup block a custom op, create a user-owned ASCEND_OPP_PATH overlay for compilation and make ModelNew switch ASCEND_OPP_PATH to that overlay only around custom_ops_lib calls, then restore the original path so regular torch_npu ops keep using the system OPP.
